  "society_power": 7.3,

  "key_event": "Rise of Abolitionism and Kansas-Nebraska Act",
  "reasoning": "Abolitionism strengthened civil society but increased sectional tensions, while the Kansas-Nebraska Act weakened federal authority and exacerbated conflict."
